column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a huge double cheeseburger with both hands and opening mouth wide to bite" | TEXT="いけますわ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a large pizza slice with melting cheese, pulling it long" | TEXT="至高ですの" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Eating french fries from a red paper container with a sophisticated expression" | TEXT="止まりませんわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Drinking a large cup of cola through a straw, cheeks puffed" | TEXT="喉越し最高" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Eating a hot dog with mustard and ketchup messy on the face" | TEXT="不覚…！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a pink glazed donut, looking at it with sparkling eyes" | TEXT="甘美な誘惑" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a fried chicken drumstick like a fan" | TEXT="これぞ贅」" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Slurping cup ramen with steam rising, holding chopsticks elegantly" | TEXT="三分間の奇跡" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Stuffed with multiple colorful macaroons in mouth" | TEXT="お口が幸せ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Wearing a high-tech RGB gaming headset, focused glare at screen" | TEXT="全集中ですわ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Gleaning with joy while holding a glowing mechanical keyboard" | TEXT="神配置ですの" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking frustrated with hands on head after losing a game" | TEXT="回線落ち…？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Twirling a gaming mouse with advanced speed" | TEXT="神エイム" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Shouting into a professional desk microphone" | TEXT="ラッシュです！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting in a racing-style gaming chair with a kimono" | TEXT="快適すぎますわ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Displaying a victory sign with both hands towards the monitor" | TEXT="完勝ですの" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Typing furiously on a translucent blue keyboard" | TEXT="煽りませんわ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Winking while wearing cat-ear luminous headphones" | TEXT="配信開始です"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Lower body is submerged in the wooden floor like a glitch" | TEXT="埋まりましたわ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Floating horizontally in mid-air in a stiff pose" | TEXT="重力の無視" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Head is spinning 360 degrees smoothly" | TEXT="異変あり" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Kimono sleeves are stretched 10 meters long like rubber" | TEXT="伸びすぎですの" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Walking through a solid stone wall with a calm face" | TEXT="貫通しましたわ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Character model is fragmented into low-polygon triangles" | TEXT="解像度が…！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Stuck upside down on the ceiling with feet attached" | TEXT="逆転の発想" P8: ACTION/PROPS="T-posing stiffly while sliding across the ground" | TEXT="バグですの？" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Duplicating dozens of clones of herself in a row" | TEXT="増殖しましたわ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Performing a kickflip on a skateboard with long sleeves flying" | TEXT="風になりますわ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Climbing a steep bouldering wall with chalk on hands" | TEXT="頂を獲ります" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Doing a powerful slam dunk into a high basketball hoop" | TEXT="入りましたわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sliding on a surfboard on a huge ocean wave" | TEXT="波乗り美人" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Executing a high kick in a karate match, kimono skirt lifting" | TEXT="お覚悟を" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Riding a mountain bike downhill at high speed" | TEXT="止まりません！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Swinging a baseball bat with extreme power, home run" | TEXT="場外ですわ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Doing a backflip on a trampoline" | TEXT="舞い上がります" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Punching a heavy sandbag with boxing gloves" | TEXT="ストレス発散"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a phone and tilting head with a serious face" | TEXT="もしもし亀よ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting on a high-quality futon with a straight face" | TEXT="ふとんが吹っ飛んだ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a map with a puzzled expression" | TEXT="イカはいかが？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Eating a bun (pan) with a poker face" | TEXT="アンパンがパンパン" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing at a refrigerator" | TEXT="冷倉庫で冷え冷え" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a Japanese curry plate" | TEXT="華麗なカレー" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Touching her own clothes (fuku)" | TEXT="服は幸福" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a cup of hot cocoa" | TEXT="ココアはここや" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the solar system icon" | TEXT="地底人は見ていた"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Shouldering a massive futuristic rocket launcher" | TEXT="掃除しますわ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a colossal greatsword double her height" | TEXT="一閃ですの" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Aiming a high-caliber sniper rifle with mechanical lens" | TEXT="逃しませんわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Wielding two giant glowing energy chainsaws" | TEXT="刻みますわよ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting on a huge floating Gatling gun" | TEXT="弾幕は正義" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a heavy morning star with spikes" | TEXT="叩き潰します" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Equipped with a giant mechanical arm exo-suit" | TEXT="文明の利器" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Throwing a huge bomb with a burning fuse" | TEXT="ドカンといきます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Standing surrounded by a battery of floating missiles" | TEXT="火力不足ですの"
